content.full_text:
December 6, 1991

Mr. John Wallace
FPPC
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Wallace:

Per your suggestion, this is to confirm our telephone conversation regarding permissable use of PAC funds. On Thursday December 5, you advised that it is permissable to use PAC funds for issues advertising. You went a step further and found that an entity paying for the advertising would not be considered a PAC unless the ads were used to recall Governor Wilson, or vote against a certain issue, candidate, etc.

I trust that I have quoted you correctly. Please confirm this in writing at your earliest convenience. Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Debbie Lozito
Admin. Asst.
